since_last: 64% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.65%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.90% · Gold -2.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 64% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.65%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.65%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.81%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.81%, MRVL +6.18%, LSCC +5.11%, LRCX +5.03%, TER +4.85%. Laggards: IBM -4.54%, NET -1.93%, INTU -1.65%, SPCX -1.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.63% at $188.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
